mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM products WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 'ON_SALE'
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 'ON_SALE' AND (product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (product_id, product_name, category, description, price, stock, image_url, status, create_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET product_name = #{name}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE products SET stock = #{stock} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE products SET status = #{status} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
